info.title: seqdex/v1/xchain.proto
info.description:
Package seqdex.v1 hosts the SeqDEX cross-chain (BTC<->Sequentia-asset) swap API
(Phase 5, milestone 2). It is intentionally a NEW, stateful, multi-step
service distinct from the same-chain TradeService (which is a single atomic
PSET and does not fit cross-chain). The daemon is the cross-chain
MAKER/counterparty: it holds reserves of the parent-chain "BTC" asset and of
the anchored Sequentia-chain asset, and drives a Design-A single-secret HTLC swap built
on the proven pkg/xchain mechanism.

MVP direction (one direction only): the taker BUYS a Sequentia-chain asset, paying BTC.
This places the taker on the Sequentia-receiving side (anchor-shortened ~1-conf
benefit) and makes the taker the INITIATOR who locks the BTC leg first
(satisfying the BTC-leg-first ordering rule).

post.summary:
ListXchainMarkets returns the BTC/Sequentia-asset pairs the maker will swap and
its current reserves on each leg.

ProposeXchainSwap is called by the taker AFTER it has locked + confirmed the
BTC leg. The daemon verifies the BTC leg against the quote (script, H,
amount, recipient, confirmed), then locks the Sequentia leg and returns it, or a
failure.

GetXchainQuote returns a firm-ish quote for buying `seq_amount` units of the
market's Sequentia-chain asset with BTC, including the maker's pubkeys and the two
CLTV timeouts. The quote is held in memory for a short window.

OpenReverseXchainSwap commits the maker: it generates the secret, LOCKS the
BTC leg (claim=taker, refund=maker, T_btc), and returns the funded BTC leg +
H + the maker's Sequentia-leg claim pubkey, so the taker can fund the asset
leg. The taker supplies its BTC-leg claim pubkey and Sequentia-leg refund
pubkey up front.

GetReverseXchainQuote quotes SELLING `seq_amount` of the market's asset FOR
BTC: returns the BTC the taker will receive (net of fee) and the two CLTV
timeouts. No leg is locked yet; it reserves BTC for the quote window.

SubmitReverseSeqLeg is called by the taker AFTER it funded + confirmed the
Sequentia asset leg. The maker verifies it against the swap (script, H,
amount/asset, confirmations) and admits it; the maker's watcher then runs the
anchor gate and claims the asset leg, revealing the secret (read it via
GetXchainSwap.preimage to claim the BTC leg).

GetXchainSwap reports the current swap state so the taker can poll for the
maker's BTC-leg claim (and for the preimage the daemon extracted). It serves
BOTH directions; in the reverse direction the `preimage` field is how the
taker reads the secret (revealed by the maker's asset-leg claim) to claim BTC.

seqAsset.description: The Sequentia-chain asset id (hex) identifying the market.

seqAmount.description: How many atoms of the Sequentia asset the taker wants to SELL.

quoteId.description: Opaque quote id; pass to OpenReverseXchainSwap.

seqAmount.description: Sequentia-asset atoms the taker will sell.

btcAmount.description: BTC atoms the taker will RECEIVE (net of the maker fee).

priceSeqPerBtc.description: Effective price (Sequentia-asset atoms per BTC atom) used for this quote.

feeBtc.description: Maker fee deducted from btc_amount (BTC atoms), for transparency.

btcLocktime.description:
T_btc: the parent-chain CLTV height at/after which the MAKER may refund its
funded BTC leg. This is the LONGER timeout (T_btc > T_seq).

seqLocktime.description:
T_seq: the Sequentia CLTV height at/after which the TAKER may refund its
funded asset leg. This is the SHORTER timeout.

expiresAtUnix.description: Unix seconds after which this quote is no longer accepted.

seqAsset.description: The Sequentia-chain asset id (hex) identifying the market.

seqAmount.description: How many units (atoms) of the Sequentia-chain asset the taker wants to BUY.

quoteId.description: Opaque quote id; pass to ProposeXchainSwap.

seqAmount.description: Sequentia-asset atoms the taker will receive.

btcAmount.description: BTC atoms the taker must lock on the parent chain.

priceSeqPerBtc.description: Effective price (Sequentia-asset atoms per BTC atom) used for this quote.

feeBtc.description: Maker fee already folded into btc_amount (BTC atoms), for transparency.

makerBtcClaimPub.description:
The maker's claim pubkey for the BTC leg (33-byte compressed, hex): the
taker locks the BTC leg claimable by THIS key with the preimage.

makerSeqRefundPub.description:
The maker's refund pubkey for the Sequentia leg (hex): the maker refunds its own
Sequentia leg with this key after T_seq.

btcLocktime.description:
T_btc: the parent-chain CLTV height at/after which the TAKER may refund its
BTC leg. This is the LONGER timeout (taker refunds last).

seqLocktime.description:
T_seq: the Sequentia CLTV height at/after which the MAKER may refund its Sequentia
leg. This is the SHORTER timeout (T_btc > T_seq).

expiresAtUnix.description: Unix seconds after which this quote is no longer accepted.

seqClaimTxid.description: The taker's Sequentia-leg claim txid, once observed (preimage revealed here).

btcClaimTxid.description: The maker's BTC-leg claim txid, once the maker has claimed.

preimage.description:
The preimage the maker extracted from the taker's Sequentia claim, hex (empty
until SEQ_CLAIMED). Returned for proof/inspection on regtest.

detail.description: Populated when state == FAILED or REFUNDED.

takerBtcClaimPub.description:
The taker's claim pubkey for the BTC leg (33-byte compressed, hex): the maker
locks the BTC leg claimable by THIS key with the preimage.

takerSeqRefundPub.description:
The taker's refund pubkey for the Sequentia leg (hex), so the maker can
recompute + verify the asset-leg redeemScript the taker will fund.

hash.description: H = sha256(secret), hex. Must match the H embedded in the BTC-leg script.

takerSeqClaimPub.description:
The taker's claim pubkey for the Sequentia leg (hex): the daemon locks the Sequentia leg
claimable by THIS key with the preimage.

takerBtcRefundPub.description:
The taker's refund pubkey on the BTC leg (hex), for the maker to recompute
and verify the BTC-leg redeemScript.

btcLeg.description: The maker's funded BTC leg (the taker claims it with the preimage).

hash.description: H = sha256(secret), hex. The maker generated the secret; only H is published.

makerSeqClaimPub.description:
The maker's claim pubkey for the Sequentia leg (hex): the taker funds the
asset leg claimable by THIS key; the maker reveals the secret by claiming it.

makerBtcRefundPub.description:
The maker's refund pubkey on the BTC leg (hex), for the taker to recompute +
verify the maker's BTC-leg redeemScript before funding the asset leg.

seqLeg.description:
The taker's confirmed Sequentia asset leg: it funded the HTLC claimable by
the maker's seq-claim pubkey and refundable by the taker after T_seq.

height.description: Parent-chain height at which the BTC leg confirmed (Hp).

redeemScript.description: The funded HTLC redeemScript, hex (OP_IF SHA256 H ... claim/refund ...).

assetId.description: Parent-chain asset id of the funded output, hex.

v1XchainBtcLeg.description:
XchainBtcLeg describes the taker's confirmed BTC-leg HTLC so the daemon can
verify it. The redeemScript is provided so the daemon can recompute the P2SH
and confirm the embedded hash/pubkeys/locktime match the quote.

btcAsset.description: The parent-chain "BTC" (pegged bitcoin) asset id, hex.

seqAsset.description: The anchored Sequentia asset id, hex.

seqReserve.description: The maker's available Sequentia-asset reserve (atoms) to sell.

btcReserve.description: The maker's available BTC reserve (atoms) to receive into.

priceSeqPerBtc.description: Price: how many Sequentia-asset atoms per 1 BTC atom (the maker's ask).

v1XchainMarket.description: XchainMarket identifies a swappable BTC/Sequentia-asset pair.

blockHash.description: The Sequentia block that confirmed the Sequentia leg.

anchorHeight.description: The anchorheight committed in that block's header (>= btc_leg.height).

v1XchainSeqLeg.description: XchainSeqLeg describes the Sequentia-leg HTLC the daemon locked for the taker.

v1XchainSwapState.description:
XchainSwapState is the maker state machine. Lifecycle (happy path):
  QUOTED -> PENDING_BTC_LOCK -> SEQ_LOCKED -> SEQ_CLAIMED -> BTC_CLAIMED.
REFUNDED / FAILED are terminal off-ramps.

 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_PENDING_BTC_LOCK: A quote was issued; the daemon is waiting for the taker to lock the BTC leg
and call ProposeXchainSwap.
 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_SEQ_LOCKED: The daemon verified the BTC leg and locked the Sequentia leg (anchored). Waiting
for the taker to claim the Sequentia leg (revealing the preimage).
 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_SEQ_CLAIMED: The taker claimed the Sequentia leg; the daemon has read the preimage off-chain.
 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_BTC_CLAIMED: The daemon claimed the BTC leg with the preimage. Swap complete.
 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_REFUNDED: The maker refunded its leg after the timeout because the taker stalled
(forward: its Sequentia leg after T_seq; reverse: its BTC leg after T_btc).
 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_FAILED: The swap failed (bad leg, RPC error, etc.). Terminal.
 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_BTC_LOCKED: REVERSE: the maker locked the BTC leg (OpenReverseXchainSwap) and is waiting
for the taker to fund the Sequentia asset leg and call SubmitReverseSeqLeg.
 - XCHAIN_SWAP_STATE_SEQ_SUBMITTED: REVERSE: the taker submitted its Sequentia asset leg and the maker verified
it; the watcher will run the anchor gate then claim it (revealing the secret).
